purpose: Public header for IconMenu — the SystemTrayIconComponent that owns the AudioDeviceManager, AudioProcessorGraph, AudioProcessorPlayer, plugin lists, the background plugin loader, and the Preferences/PluginList windows.
invariants: Menu ID offsets kEditOffset..kMoveDownOffset are spaced exactly 1_000_000 apart; menuInvocationCallback range checks rely on this spacing.

Member declaration order matters: deviceManager is declared before player/graph so it destructs after them — the destructor must manually detach the audio callback FIRST to avoid use-after-free on the realtime thread.
PluginLoadThread and PluginListWindow are forward-declared as nested class names; their definitions live in IconMenu.cpp.
gotchas: PreferencesWindow is forward-declared, so IconMenu.cpp must include PreferencesWindow.h to call any of its methods.
sortedPluginCache and sortedCacheDirty are mutable so getTimeSortedList() can stay const; any code path that changes plugin order/membership must set sortedCacheDirty = true.
